llm_explanation.summary: Customer reports a broken product and five days of ignored support requests.
llm_explanation.reason: High risk score with strong indicators: product damage and support delay.

llm_explanation.summary: Customer inquires about order tracking status, no product defect mentioned.
llm_explanation.reason: Low risk score, standard tracking inquiry can be auto-resolved.

llm_explanation.summary: Customer received wrong item for third time, threatening to leave.
llm_explanation.reason: High risk due to repeated failures and churn threat.
